subject: [PATCH 6/8] mm: slab: per-node kmem accounting for slab

2026-05-11.patch_summary: This patch updates the slab hook to use per-node object cgroups for accurate NUMA attribution of kernel memory usage (NR_KMEM). It achieves this by introducing a new nid_objcg variable, which retrieves the per-node object cgroup based on the node ID of the slab. The patch modifies several functions within the memcontrol.c file to utilize the nid_objcg instead of the global objcg. This change ensures that kernel memory usage is attributed correctly to each NUMA node, providing a more accurate picture of system resource utilization.
